overview: Professional website for Ma's House Chinese Cuisine Restaurant in Palava City, Thane — featuring a full menu, hours, location, and WhatsApp contact with a warm red and gold design.
features: Hero section with 4.9-star rating and CTAs
Full menu with categories, dishes, and prices in ₹
Location page with address, hours, and Google Maps link
Responsive design for mobile and desktop
Warm red and gold visual theme
